name: Spinach"souffle
recipeIngredient: 2 packages frozen chopped spinach, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the cooked and drained spinach with the grated potato until well combined.
2. Add the salt and pepper to the mixture.
3. Stir in the egg whites until just incorporated.
4. Fold in the cottage cheese until evenly distributed throughout the batter.
5. Grease an oven-safe baking dish with cooking oil.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish, ensuring it is spread evenly.
7. Place the dish in a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C).
8. Bake for about 1 hour, or until the souffle has risen and firm consistency.
Note: Turn off the heat after baking. Allow the souffle to cool before serving.
